message:
fix: only clear legacy markers when native binary is positively found

The previous logic used unwrap_or(false) when no am binary was found,
which incorrectly cleared all legacy markers. This would suppress the
migration prompt when the Python binary was removed but orphaned
artifacts (database, pyproject.toml) still exist.

Now only clears markers when we positively find a native (non-Python)
binary — if no binary is found at all, markers are preserved.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
